## ServiceNow rallies after Q2 beat and raised guidance, reinforcing AI workflow platform thesis

A beat-and-raise from ServiceNow validates that enterprise AI is converting to revenue for best-positioned workflow incumbents; raises the bar for software peers yet to report and strengthens the re-architected-incumbent sub-thesis.

- ServiceNow Q2 results topped Wall Street expectations.
- Company raised forward guidance, adding a momentum signal beyond the quarter.
- Stock rallied on the print.
- Headline explicitly frames NOW as a high-growth AI stock, affirming AI-native workflow positioning among enterprise incumbents.
